Plugin.Name: Unraid Rsync
Plugin.Overview: A native Unraid 7.x webGui plugin for scheduling and monitoring multiple independent rsync backup jobs, either over SSH to/from a remote host or locally between two paths on the server.
Plugin.Description: Unraid Rsync schedules and monitors multiple rsync backup jobs, each with its own cron schedule, source->destination pairs, and rsync options. Includes a whitelisted set of rsync flags with inline help, pre/post hooks, live status badges, a per-run log viewer, paginated history across jobs, native Unraid notifications, and reusable SSH connections supporting existing-key-file, managed-key, and password authentication.
